login.title: Log In
login.heading: Log In
login.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account, then log in.
login.registrationSuccessToast: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

register.title: Sign Up
register.heading: Sign Up
register.name: Name
register.success: Registration successful! Redirecting to OTP verification...

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with this email, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.
forgotPassword.failed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.heading: Set new password
resetPassword.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
resetPassword.success: Password reset successful! Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The token may have expired.

verifyOtp.title: Verify Your Email
verifyOtp.heading: Verify Your Email
verifyOtp.success: Email verified successfully! Redirecting to dashboard...
verifyOtp.resendSuccess: OTP has been resent to your email!

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number

errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
